productName: Zero Gravity ( I ) Plaid Jacket BHO THCA Infused Joint - 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Zero Gravity supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, berry, and pine, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
